ddls:
CREATE TABLE "comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous supplied value for comparison */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New supplied value for comparison */,
  "prev_sign" TEXT /* Sign of the previous value (if applicable) */,
  "new_sign" TEXT /* Sign of the new value (if applicable) */,
  "correct_result" INTEGER /* Result of the comparison indicating accuracy */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comparison was made */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source from where the values are coming */,
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* ID of the threshold used for this comparison */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the comparison */,
  "comparison_type" TEXT /* Type of comparison (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  "result_details" TEXT /* Detailed explanation of the result */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the comparison (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_threshold_id FOREIGN KEY ("threshold_id") REFERENCES comparison_thresholds ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparison_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparison that generated this log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the comparison */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message providing details about the log */,
  "log_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "comparison_type" TEXT /* Type of comparison (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  "result_details" TEXT /* Detailed explanation of the result */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the comparison (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the comparison was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_logs_comparison_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_id") REFERENCES comparisons ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Database, API) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., live, historical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the data source */,
  "base_url" TEXT /* Base URL of the API or database */,
  "auth_method" TEXT /* Authentication method used (e.g., API key, OAuth) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data source is active */,
  "last_sync" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data sync */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the setting was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparison_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result summary */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related comparison */,
  "total_comparisons" INTEGER /* Total number of comparisons made */,
  "successful_comparisons" INTEGER /* Number of successful comparisons */,
  "failed_comparisons" INTEGER /* Number of failed comparisons */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the comparison */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source from where the values are coming */,
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* ID of the threshold used for this comparison */,
  "comparison_type" TEXT /* Type of comparison (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  "result_details" TEXT /* Detailed explanation of the result */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the comparison (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_results_comparison_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_id") REFERENCES comparisons ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_results_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_results_threshold_id FOREIGN KEY ("threshold_id") REFERENCES comparison_thresholds ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_results_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparison_thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the threshold condition */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value of the threshold */,
  "threshold_type" TEXT /* Type of threshold (e.g., standard, critical) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the threshold is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id")
)
